title: Snap To Surface Feature
description:
Properties:
• description ({ identifier })
• vertical_search_range (int)
• surface (string)
• allow_air_placement (boolean)
• allow_underwater_placement (boolean)
• allowed_surface_blocks (string[])
• embed_in_surface (boolean)

identifier.title: Identifier
identifier.description: The name of this feature in the form 'namespace_name:feature_name'. 'feature_name' must match the filename.

vertical_search_range.title: Vertical Search Range
vertical_search_range.description: Range to search for a floor or ceiling for snaping the feature.

surface.title: Surface
surface.description: Defines the surface that the y-value of the placement position will be snapped to. Valid values: 'ceiling', 'floor' and 'random_horizontal'

allow_air_placement.title: Allow Air Placement
allow_air_placement.description: Determines whether the feature can snap through air blocks. Defaults to true.

allow_underwater_placement.title: Allow Underwater Placement
allow_underwater_placement.description: Determines whether the feature can snap through water blocks. Defaults to false.

allowed_surface_blocks.title: Allowed Surface Blocks
allowed_surface_blocks.description: A list of blocks that the feature is permitted to snap to. Leaving this empty results in the feature snapping to blocks that can provide support for the given face (up/down/horizontal)

embed_in_surface.title: Embed In Surface
embed_in_surface.description: Determines whether the placed feature should be embedded in the found surface.

defaultSnippets.label: Snap To Surface Feature
defaultSnippets.description: Create a Snap To Surface Feature
